'''Migress''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Filvian (Brolf)|Brolf]] working under [[Filvian (Brolf)|Patriot]] (Filvian) on the planet [[Barlok/Legends|Barlok]] to assassinate [[Passel Argente/Legends|Passel Argente]] in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], when negotiations were held on the planet between the [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] and the [[Gilfrome|guildmaster]] of Barlok's [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operations.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

Migress received [[burst thrusters]] from his fellow conspirators [[Duefgrin]] and [[Jhompfi]] to contribute to the building of a homemade [[Missile/Legends|missile]]. The missile was to be used for the assassination attempt against the Corporate Alliance leader.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

The plot, masterminded by [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] and [[Kinman Doriana/Legends|Kinman Doriana]], was foiled by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Jorus C'baoth]], who called on [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to stop the missile as it entered the negotiations chamber—using a [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force grip]].<ref name="Outbound Flight" />
